position_summary: Claude's round-3 position is directionally right: the Streamlit workbench should be anchored by the deterministic <1s referee, with the cached funnel and pre-computed Claude Science lane supporting rather than driving the demo. Repo verification confirms the corrected sys.path preflight runs and the NAB2→multiple sclerosis triple is the clean disease-hop NO, but two stale handoff seams remain in repo docs that could mislead the build if followed literally.

findings.title: One stale preflight sentence still asks for failing `import arbiter` semantics
findings.evidence: Verified from repo root: plain `python -c "import arbiter"` fails with `ModuleNotFoundError`; the corrected one-liner with `sys.path.insert(0, str(Path('src').resolve()))` runs and returns `untested`. `docs/plans/streamlit_workbench_plan_2026-07-08.md:165-171` has the correct command, but `docs/plans/streamlit_workbench_plan_2026-07-08.md:71-73` still says the preflight must include `python -c "import arbiter; ...referee_triple(...)"`.
findings.concern_path: A builder or future agent reads the data-contract section instead of the later build-plan section and reinstates the failing preflight, wasting the first Tier-1 smoke pass or masking the repo-root import issue.
findings.suggested_action: Treat lines 165-171 as canonical; delete or rewrite the stale line 73 wording to say the preflight must insert `src/` before importing `arbiter.lbd...`.

findings.title: Demo-video plan still scripts SLC1A5 as the showcased REFUTED case
findings.evidence: The final Streamlit plan correctly says the three showcased triples are NAB2→atopic eczema, SATB1→asthma, and NAB2→multiple sclerosis, and explicitly says not to surface SLC1A5 as the clean NO (`docs/plans/streamlit_workbench_plan_2026-07-08.md:168-176`). But the linked demo-video plan still says Scene 3 chooses SLC1A5+asthma (`docs/plans/demo_video_plan_2026-07-08.md:103-104`), the preset row includes SLC1A5 (`:131`), and preflight still expects SLC1A5 (`:143-144`).
findings.concern_path: The final plan says to wire the Streamlit app into the demo-video pack, so a builder following both docs can implement the corrected app but record the old SLC1A5 NO, losing the disease-hop isolation that motivated the NAB2→MS replacement.
findings.suggested_action: Before recording or writing the Playwright script, patch the demo-video plan/pack to replace SLC1A5→asthma with NAB2→multiple sclerosis everywhere in Scene 3, presets, and smoke assertions.

escalated_findings.rationale: Partially addressed but not fully closed. The canonical build-plan command is now correct and was verified live, but the same Streamlit plan still contains a stale data-contract sentence requiring an `import arbiter` preflight form that fails from repo root.

dropped_findings.rationale: Addressed for the app handoff. The historical CS artifact still contains SLC1A5, but the Streamlit plan explicitly keeps it out of the clean-NO demo and requires NAB2→MS as the sole showcased clean disease-hop NO.

Addressed enough for implementation. The design brief still preserves the full workbench vision, but it now clearly demarcates Tier-1 MVP first and labels explorer, theming, motion, and live-CS work as post-preflight.

recommended_next_question: The single thing to watch during the build: do not start Tier-2/CS or demo-video scripting until the corrected Tier-1 preflight passes with NAB2→MS replacing every stale SLC1A5 clean-NO reference.
